title: gomphandra pauciflora
intro: Gomphandra pauciflora, also known as few-flowered gomphandra, is a plant species in the family Stemonuraceae, native to tropical Asia and Pacific regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gomphandra pauciflora include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. Gomphandra pauciflora can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
